json_ld.title: QA Tester (Game/Web) Thu Nhập Up To 30M - Nhận Việc Ngay
json_ld.description:
Mô tả công việc

• Responsible for testing software on Web / iOS / Android platforms to ensure product quality, including:

• Creating test cases and reports

• Executing function and usability testing

• Defect tracking via JIRA and close collaboration with development team.

• Test data/environment setup and process validation.

Yêu cầu ứng viên

• At least 1-2 years of QA experience (App/Web testing preferred) (Game Industry)

• Capable of defect classification and test result analysis

• Strong communication skills to work with PMs and developers

• Familiar with API testing tools (Postman, RestAssured)

• Experience with performance/stress testing tools (e.g., JMeter)

• Good English communication skills

 

Bonus qualifications

• Familiar with automated testing and CI/CD (e.g., Selenium, Appium, Jenkins)

• Scripting skills for test automation is a plus.

Quyền lợi được hưởng

• Salary range: 10,000,000 VND – 30,000,000 VND/month (based on experience).

• Monthly meal allowance and full employee benefits

• Fully stocked pantry with snacks, coffee, tea, and more

• Official employees enjoy paid leave, holiday bonuses, and Tet bonuses as per company policy.

• Generous bonus system:13th-month salary, performance bonuses

• Internal events: Happy Hour, Internal Party, Company trip. YEP

• Young, dynamic, and fun working environment

• Work Schedule: Monday - Friday (5 days/week), flexible check in-out
